_readme: UK English translations. Keys must not be changed. Only translate the values. Update footnote_star2_url to the English version of the combined-ticket page when available.

texts.title: Estimate the cost of your Barcelona visits
texts.intro_1: Enter your family members' ages and choose the visits you want to make to get a personalised cost estimate.
texts.intro_2: You can also use it to more easily compare the various Barcelona city passes (we weren't tempted by any of them).
texts.age_note: Different venues use different age criteria for pricing. Enter the age at the time of the visit for an exact calculation.
texts.disclaimer_online: Prices for advance online purchase — on-the-door prices are often higher; see each venue's website.
texts.disclaimer_discounts: Discounts often apply: seniors, disabled visitors, etc. — see each venue's website.
texts.disclaimer_update: Prices last updated here in April 2026 — they may have changed since.
texts.footnote_star: * Free entry possible on certain days — see the article for details
texts.footnote_star2: ** A cheaper combined ticket may be available (online only, without a guide — see the website for more details)
